title: engelhardia danumensis
intro: Engelhardia danumensis is a species of plant in the family Juglandaceae, commonly known as the Danum walnut. It is native to Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves and seeds are used in traditional medicine to treat various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
